WebUI did not respond within 3 minutes. Service log: journalctl --user -u open-webui -e
LiteLLM did not respond within 60 s. Service log: journalctl --user -u litellm -e
wpisz nazwę modelu lub wybierz z listy: type a model name or pick from the list
Sprawdź dostępne modele na <a href=\"htt: Check available models at ollama.com/library, type the name in the field above and click Download.
Wystawia jeden endpoint (zgodny z API Op: Exposes a single endpoint (OpenAI-compatible) behind which LiteLLM routes requests to models on the hosts from the server list (the bar at the top of the window). This means e.g. VS Code/Continue can use models on several computers at once while pointing at just this one address.
Podgląd modeli i hostów, które trafią do: Preview of the models and hosts that will end up in the LiteLLM config, based on the server list at the top of the window.
Każda zmiana zapisuje override systemd i: Every change writes a systemd override and restarts the Ollama service (requires administrator privileges - loaded models will briefly disappear from memory). Empty field + Apply = revert to Ollama's default behavior.
Jak długo model zostaje w pamięci po ost: How long a model stays in memory after the last request before being unloaded (a few minutes by default). E.g. 30m, 1h, -1 (always), 0 (immediately).
Rozmiar okna kontekstu w tokenach (domyś: Context window size in tokens (the default 4096 is too small for agentic work in Continue/OpenCode).
Ile modeli może być jednocześnie załadow: How many models can be loaded into memory at the same time (default: 3x the number of GPUs).
Ile równoległych zapytań obsłuży jeden z: How many parallel requests a single loaded model will handle at once.
Zmniejsza zużycie pamięci przy dłuższym: Reduces memory usage with a longer context, if the model and hardware support it.
Kwantyzacja pamięci podręcznej kontekstu: Context cache quantization - q8_0 is roughly -50% VRAM usage with negligible quality loss.
Backend Vulkan zamiast ROCm - szersza ko: Vulkan backend instead of ROCm - broader compatibility with AMD cards without full ROCm support (e.g. BC-250).
Czy Ollama może korzystać ze zintegrowan: Whether Ollama may use the integrated GPU (iGPU) - enabled by default. Uncheck to force skipping the iGPU (e.g. when troubleshooting a unified CPU+GPU architecture like BC-250).
Zainstalować Ollamę teraz?\n\nPobierze i:
Install Ollama now?

This will download and run the official install script from ollama.com
(requires administrator privileges and an internet connection).
Instaluję Ollamę - to może potrwać kilka: Installing Ollama - this may take a few minutes...
Zainstalowano 'uv', ale nie widać go w ~: Installed 'uv', but it's not visible in ~/.local/bin.
pkill: nie udało się zatrzymać procesu W: pkill: failed to stop the WebUI process
Enter the server's name and address.
At least one server must remain.
Jeden adres dla modeli z wielu serwerów: One address for models from multiple Ollama servers
Instalacja już trwa - poczekaj na zakońc: Installation is already in progress - wait for it to finish.
Operacja na WebUI już trwa - poczekaj na: A WebUI operation is already in progress - wait for it to finish.
Zainstalować Open WebUI teraz?\n\nZainst:
Install Open WebUI now?

This will install the 'open-webui' package via pip, for the current user
(no Docker, no administrator privileges - requires internet access).
Instaluję Open WebUI - to może potrwać k: Installing Open WebUI - this may take a few minutes...
Wymaga uprawnień administratora - aktual:
Requires administrator privileges - currently loaded
models will briefly be unloaded from memory.
Operacja na LiteLLM już trwa - poczekaj: A LiteLLM operation is already in progress - wait for it to finish.
Zainstalować LiteLLM teraz?\n\nZainstalu:
Install LiteLLM now?

This will install the 'litellm[proxy]' package via uv, for the current user
(no Docker, no administrator privileges - requires internet access).
Instaluję LiteLLM - to może potrwać kilk: Installing LiteLLM - this may take a few minutes...
Pobieranie już trwa - poczekaj na zakońc: A download is already in progress - wait for it to finish.
Ustawić {nazwa} na \"{wartosc}\" i zrest: Set {nazwa} to "{wartosc}" and restart the Ollama service?
Usunąć {nazwa} (wrócić do domyślnego zac: Remove {nazwa} (revert to Ollama's default behavior) and restart the service?
Brak dostępnych modeli (hosty nieosiągal: No models available (hosts unreachable or empty).
Domyślnie Ollama nasłuchuje tylko lokaln: By default Ollama only listens locally (127.0.0.1) - other devices on the network can't connect. Check this to make it listen on all interfaces (0.0.0.0) and be reachable from outside this computer (e.g. from another PC, or for a BC-250 acting as a client).
Allow access from outside this computer (0.0.0.0)
Wklej poniższą treść do pliku ~/.continu: Paste the text below into ~/.continue/config.yaml (overwriting it entirely, or merging it by hand with what's already there if you have other models). The app never writes this file automatically.
Brak dostępnych modeli (hosty nieosiągal: No models available (hosts unreachable or empty) - check the server list at the top of the window and try again.
Każdy model dostaje domyślnie role: chat: Every model gets the default roles: chat, edit, apply. Other roles are also available for manual editing in the text below: autocomplete (editor suggestions), embed (embedding models, e.g. nomic-embed-text - used for RAG), rerank (search result ranking). A model that isn't meant for chat/code editing should have its roles swapped for the right one from this list.
